violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -All shelving in back room area need cleaned.

Receptacles for refuse, recyclables, and returnables. — --Equipment used for refuse, recyclables and returnables was not clean or not cleaned at a frequency to prevent buildup of soil. -Clean garbage cans in backroom area.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Floors walls and ceiling need cleaned.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not maintained in good repair. -Floors have some cracked tiles. -Replace missing corner trim pieces.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -Clean soda dispenser tray.--Food contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Slicer was not cleaned properly from previous night.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Fan cover in walk in cooler needs cleaned.
Toilet facilities. — --Toilet room was not clean or kept in good repair. -Men's and women's toilets needs cleaned.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Floors and walls need cleaning in back prep and dishwash areas.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. -Repair damaged drywall in dishwash and prep areas.

Storage and handling of maintenance items. — --Wet-use maintenance items, such as mops, were not placed in a position that allows proper air-drying. -Soiled wet mop sitting on floor in back prep area.
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
